visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a flat cap, thick-framed glasses, and a grey patterned cardigan over a white t-shirt stands on a city sidewalk. He looks around with a curious facial expression and gestures with his hands while speaking. The background features a busy urban street with cars and various commercial signs under natural overcast daylight. (2) The camera tilts upward to show the red exterior of a building and a prominent circular sign for "miko" mobile phone store. The man walks toward the entrance, and the shot cuts to the interior of the store. (3) Inside the store, the man stands at a clean white counter, facing a young male staff member wearing a white miko-branded t-shirt. The interior is brightly lit with white studio lighting, showing shelves stocked with smartphone boxes and electronics in the background. (4) A series of close-up shots show smartphone product boxes for the iPhone 16 Pro Max, Samsung Galaxy A56, and Vivo V40 Lite placed on a wooden surface. Graphic text overlays displaying prices and savings appear over the boxes in sequence. (5) The man and the staff member interact over the counter; the staff member holds up a white branded drink carrier and a brown scent packet to display them. The man reacts with wide eyes and an animated smile. (6) The man exits the store and stands on the sidewalk again. He points toward a colorful neon "Market" sign and a street full of commercial buildings. He looks at the camera and starts walking away as the scene ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c最有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 老闆你特地帶我遠道. (2) [Variety]: 桃園. [Subtitle]: 到桃園，是不是有什麼超殺優惠要搶? (3) [Subtitle]: 我跟你講!! 只要通訊行有新開店. (4) [Variety]: 超殺優惠. [Subtitle]: 都會有超殺優惠. (5) [Logo]: miko. [Subtitle]: 米可剛好在桃園有開新店. (6) [Variety]: 殺得他措手不及! [Subtitle]: 我們進去，直接問店員價格! (7) [Variety]: 👀. [Subtitle]: 新店開有什麼新優惠嗎? (8) [Subtitle]: 有! 限時3天有優惠. 針對iPhone 16 Pro Max. (9) [Subtitle]: 現在是39890元，我們現省5010. (10) [Subtitle]: 還有三星的A56 8+256GB的. (11) [Subtitle]: 售價的話是13490元. (12) [Subtitle]: 再加碼送45W快充旅充組. (13) [Subtitle]: 價值1690元. [Variety]: 現省$5190. (14) [Subtitle]: 最後的話是我們V40的Lite 256GB的版本. (15) [Subtitle]: 售價是7490元. [Variety]: 現省$6500. (16) [Subtitle]: 省很多耶! 那你們開店有送東西嗎? (17) [Subtitle]: 我們現在在開幕慶，來店的話買就送. (18) [Variety]: CP值超高!. [Subtitle]: 飲料提帶，還有香氛包. (19) [Subtitle]: 那我最後問你，那附近有什麼好吃的? (20) [Variety]: ＼有大湳市場!／. [Subtitle]: 這邊有大湳市場喔. (21) [Variety]: ＼導演! 走吧!／. [Subtitle]: 有大湳市場! 導演走吧!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥), 1 store staff member behind the counter.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main creator is a middle-aged man with short hair, wearing a grey newsboy-style flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, a white t-shirt, and a grey open-front patterned cardigan.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from a busy Taiwanese urban street with commercial signage and traffic to the clean, modern interior of a mobile phone retail store featuring product displays and shelving.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male voice begins speaking with a cheerful and engaging tone. The speech rate is rapid and rhythmic. Background noise includes a soft urban traffic hum with distant engine sounds. (2) A sharp "ding" sound effect triggers, immediately followed by an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop BGM track with a steady kick drum and synth chords. The acoustic environment shifts to a cleaner room tone. (3) A "whoosh" transition SFX occurs as a second male voice starts speaking in a helpful, calm, and professional manner. The BGM maintains its volume and energy. Short digital "pop" SFX are synchronized with product price mentions. (4) Light "click" and "bubble" sound effects punctuate the dialogue as product boxes are shown. The original male speaker reacts with a high-pitched, enthusiastic exclamation. (5) Sound of soft plastic rustling is audible as items are handled. The background music continues with a vibrant synthesizer melody. (6) The recording returns to an outdoor acoustic profile with a noticeable wind floor and distant human chatter. The primary male voice delivers a final loud command before the music quickly fades out with a hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional unboxing and retail showcase. It uses a high-energy vlog format to inform viewers about a new store opening in Taoyuan, focusing on exclusive three-day discounts for popular smartphones and free gifts to drive foot traffic and brand awareness for miko.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of store location, exclusive opening discounts, and presentation of free branded promotional gifts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video follows the standard 'Tech Vlogger' style, characterized by high-density captions, rapid editing, and highly expressive vocal delivery.
